'''EV-4D9''' was a [[MerenData/Legends|MerenData]] [[EV-series supervisor droid/Legends|EV-series supervisor droid]] that was part of [[Ploovo's Protocol Team]].

==Biography==
One of the [[EV-series supervisor droid/Legends|EV-series]] droids to have installed a [[MDF motivator]] to improve its efficiency, the MDF also provided them with malice and [[Torture/Legends|torture]] skill. MerenData tried to cover the incident and, when it was discovered, they tried to recall all of the droids. EV-4D9 was not recovered.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

EV-4D9's master did notice the droid's brutal tendency and even promoted it. With a few modifications, the master had an effective interrogator. EV-4D9 was provided with an arc welder, a plasteel cutter, a thermal drill and three different solution injectors for truth- or pain-inducing serum.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

During the [[Glite-Ven hostilities]], EV-4D9 was noticed by [[Lotas]] and [[HN-TR1]] of [[Ploovo's Protocol Team]]. Both of them expressed their interest in EV-4D9 and [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]], following their suggestion, acquired EV-4D9. EV-4D9 since joined the Protocol Team, and Lotas repeatedly expressed admiration towards its darkly analytical functions.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

==Characteristics==
EV-4D9 was an EV-Series supervisor droid that stood at 1.6 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and had [[Gender/Legends|masculine progaming]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />
